name: Xilinx, Inc.
description: Xilinx, Inc. was an American technology and semiconductor company that pioneered the fabless manufacturing model and invented the first commercially viable field-programmable gate array (FPGA). The company specialized in programmable logic devices, adaptive system-on-chip platforms, and advanced software solutions for various industries, including data centers, automotive, and communications. In February 2022, Xilinx was acquired by Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) in an all-stock transaction. Following the acquisition, Xilinx operates as a subsidiary of AMD, significantly expanding AMD's portfolio of high-performance and adaptive computing solutions across diverse markets.
